31203.title: The Situation Room with Wolf Blitzer
31203.description: Wolf Blitzer is in the command center for breaking news, politics and extraordinary reports from around the world.

31204.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
31204.description: Erin Burnett stays ahead of the headlines, delivering a show that's in-depth and informative.

31205.title: Anderson Cooper 360
31205.description: Anderson Cooper goes beyond the headlines to tell stories from many points of view, so you can make up your own mind about the news.

31206.title: Don Lemon Tonight
31206.description: Don Lemon brings you the biggest stories, newsmakers and spirited conversations of the day.

31207.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

31208.title: World Sport

31218.title: Connect the World
31218.description: Connect the World takes viewers on a sweeping journey across continents, beyond headlines and into the stories changing our world.

31220.title: Connect the World
31220.description: Connect the World takes viewers on a sweeping journey across continents, beyond headlines and into the stories changing our world.

31221.title: Inside Politics
31221.description: An insider's look into the key stories of the week from John King and a group of America's top political reporters.

31222.title: African Voices Changemakers
31222.description: A Kenyan producer is on a mission to make the superhero genre more inclusive; the visionary behind the South Africa's first superhero comic book series.

31223.title: Amanpour
31223.description: Christiane Amanpour provides her powerful interview skills and provocative analysis on global stories that matter to you.

31224.title: Hala Gorani Tonight
31224.description: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

31225.title: Quest Means Business
31225.description: Richard Quest presides over a cast of experts and correspondents to deliver unrivaled facts, figures and analysis from the business world, a nightly wealth check.

31226.title: Africa Avant Garde
31226.description: We hear from some of the continent's most experimental contemporary artists, including acclaimed Nigerian visual artist Victor Ehikhamenor.

31227.description: Jake Tapper covers all the day's top stories around the country and the globe, from politics to money, sports to popular culture.
